ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the review */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "rate" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who left the review */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the review (e.g., true/false for approved/rejected) */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the rating */,
  "rate" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderations" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being moderated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the moderation action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the moderator (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderation action was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderation action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderations_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the review */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flag was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the review */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the review */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed/ interacted with the review */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the review */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the review */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the review */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_analytics_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spam_detection" (
  "spam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spam detection entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "spam_score" REAL /* Spam score for the review */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the spam detection entry was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the spam detection entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_detection_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_detection_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search query was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search query was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the search result */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the search result */,
  "create_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search result was created */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)
